All current Claude models support text and image input, text output, multilingual capabilities, and vision.
Claude Fable 5, Claude Mythos 5, Claude Mythos Preview, Claude Opus 4.8, Opus 4.7, Opus 4.6, Sonnet 5, and Sonnet 4.6 include the full 1M token context window at standard pricing.
